input.title: Cartography of the Unseen
input.logline: A blind geographer creates tactile maps of places she has never seen — and her maps begin revealing things sighted cartographers missed
input.festival: IDFA 2024 Main Competition, Special Jury Mention

test_cases.notes: Subject line contains all key commercial information. Body covers all acquisition essentials in under 200 words. Screener access offered concretely. Single clear ask.

test_cases.description: Independent drama film post-festival with no prior deals

input.title: Seven Hours
input.logline: A defence lawyer discovers her client is innocent twelve hours before his execution — and cannot reach anyone with the authority to stop it
input.context: Post-Tribeca outreach, no sales agent attached

test_cases.notes: Drama format handled appropriately. Absence of sales agent noted without undermining confidence. Worldwide availability is clear selling point.

test_cases.description: Series pitch to streaming distributor, no festival history

input.title: Common Ground
input.logline: Four rural communities across Europe where farming subsidies have been cut, and the very different political choices their residents make in response

test_cases.notes: Absence of festival pedigree handled honestly. Series format requires slightly different commercial framing than a feature. Screener-only approach acknowledged as a weaker position.
